{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Suriel's Presence
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Suriel's Presence]] is a [[construct]] that communicates via words, thoughts, and impressions.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
